name: Elbow
description: Fat pastel pipe elbows re-plumbing themselves quarter-turn by quarter-turn — the network reroutes on every redraw.

code.style: --pipe: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --bend: @p(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border: solid var(--pipe); border-width: calc(170px / @Y) calc(170px / @Y) 0 0; border-radius: 0 100% 0 0; transform: rotate(var(--bend)); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
